market: AI still screens as an infrastructure-and-distribution market first: NVIDIA and Microsoft remain the clearest evidence-backed monetizers, while broad software profit capture is still less proven than usage growth headlines imply.
tech: Enterprise adoption is deepening in coding, search, support, and structured workflow automation, but current evidence still points to concentrated high-value use cases rather than universal monetization across the app layer.
risk: Main risks are power and energization bottlenecks, capex outrunning downstream monetization, model-layer commoditization, and policy regimes that increasingly split AI markets by geography and compliance burden.
